Class Agi

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.event.BasicPropertyChangeSource
uno.anahata.asi.agi.Agi
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
public class Agi extends BasicPropertyChangeSource
The central, provider-agnostic artificial super intelligence (ASI) orchestrator.

This class serves as the 'Anahata' (heart) of a conversation session, managing the high-level lifecycle of an agentic turn. It orchestrates the flow between user input, tool execution, context assembly via ContextManager, and multimodal generation via registered AbstractAiProviders.

Thread Safety: This class is designed to be thread-safe, utilizing reentrant locks for state transitions and atomic booleans for lifecycle flags.

Author:
anahata

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final List<AbstractModelMessage>
    activeCandidates
    The list of candidate messages currently being generated or waiting for selection.
    private final AgiConfig
    config
    The configuration for this agi session.
    private final ContextManager
    contextManager
    The manager for the conversation history and context assembly.
    private String
    conversationSummary
    A high-level summary of the conversation's current state or topic.
    private Thread
    currentExecutionThread
    The thread currently executing the agi turn.

    executor
    The executor service for background tasks and API calls.

    lastResponse
    The last response received from the model.

    nickname
    The user-defined nickname for this agi session.
    private boolean
    open
    Whether this session is currently 'Open' in the host UI (e.g. tab visible).

    The request configuration for this agi session.

    resourceManager
    The V2 URI-centric Resource Manager.

    running
    A thread-safe flag indicating if the main agi loop is currently active.
    private ReentrantLock
    runningLock
    A ReentrantLock to synchronize access to shared mutable state (e.g., `running`, `stagedUserMessage`).

    selectedModel
    The currently selected model for the agi session.
    private AtomicBoolean
    shutdown
    A thread-safe flag indicating if the agi session has been shut down.

    stagedUserMessage
    A message that has been submitted via sendMessage(UserMessage) while the agi was busy.
    private final StatusManager
    statusManager
    The manager for the agi's operational status and error reporting.
    private final ToolManager
    toolManager
    The manager for all AI tools available in this session.
    private AbstractModelMessage
    toolPromptMessage
    The model message that initiated the tool calls currently awaiting user approval.

    propertyChangeSupport

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Agi(@NonNull AgiConfig config)
    Constructs a new Agi session with the provided configuration.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    autoSave(String reason)
    Performs an automatic backup of the session to the active sessions directory.
    void
    bindToContainer(@NonNull AbstractAsiContainer container)
    Re-binds this agi session to an AsiContainer after deserialization.
    void
    checkToolPromptCompletion()
    Checks if the current tool prompt is complete (no pending tools) and clears it if so.
    boolean
    chooseCandidate(@NonNull AbstractModelMessage message)
    Adds a chosen model message to the history, handles tool execution, and continues the conversation if necessary.
    void
    clear()
    Resets the entire agi session history to a clean slate.
    void
    clearToolPrompt()
    Clears the current tool prompt and reverts the status to IDLE if necessary.
    private void
    executeTurnLoop()
    Orchestrates the conversation turn loop, handling both synchronous and streaming modes, retries, and candidate selection.
    List<AbstractModelMessage>
    getActiveCandidates()
    Gets an unmodifiable view of the active candidates.
    List<AbstractModel>
    getAllModels()
    Gets a flattened list of all models available from all registered providers.
    List<Agi>
    getChildren()
    Retrieves all active sessions spawned by this Agi.
    double
    getContextWindowUsage()
    Gets the current context window usage as a percentage (0.0 to 1.0).
    String
    getDisplayName()
    Gets a human-readable display name for the session.
    Optional<Response<? extends AbstractModelMessage>>
    getLastResponse()
    Gets the last response received from the AI model.
    int
    getLastTotalTokenCount()
    Gets the total token count from the last response, if available.
    Optional<Agi>
    getParent()
    Retrieves the parent session that spawned this Agi, if any.

    getProviders()
    Gets a list of AI providers available for this session.

    Gets a short version of the session ID.

  • Field Details

    • config

      private final AgiConfig config
      The configuration for this agi session.

    • nickname

      private String nickname
      The user-defined nickname for this agi session.

    • toolManager

      private final ToolManager toolManager
      The manager for all AI tools available in this session.

    • contextManager

      private final ContextManager contextManager
      The manager for the conversation history and context assembly.

    • resourceManager

      private final ResourceManager resourceManager
      The V2 URI-centric Resource Manager.

    • executor

      private transient ExecutorService executor
      The executor service for background tasks and API calls.

    • statusManager

      private final StatusManager statusManager
      The manager for the agi's operational status and error reporting.

    • selectedModel

      private transient AbstractModel selectedModel
      The currently selected model for the agi session.

    • requestConfig

      private final RequestConfig requestConfig
      The request configuration for this agi session.

    • running

      private transient volatile boolean running
      A thread-safe flag indicating if the main agi loop is currently active.

    • currentExecutionThread

      private transient volatile Thread currentExecutionThread
      The thread currently executing the agi turn. Used for interruption.

    • stagedUserMessage

      private UserMessage stagedUserMessage
      A message that has been submitted via sendMessage(UserMessage) while the agi was busy. It will be picked up and processed as soon as the current conversation turn is complete.

    • shutdown

      private transient AtomicBoolean shutdown
      A thread-safe flag indicating if the agi session has been shut down.

    • open

      private boolean open
      Whether this session is currently 'Open' in the host UI (e.g. tab visible). This field is persisted to restore UI state across application restarts.

    • lastResponse

      private Response<? extends AbstractModelMessage> lastResponse
      The last response received from the model. Used for state persistence and status panel initialization on deserialization.

    • activeCandidates

      private final List<AbstractModelMessage> activeCandidates
      The list of candidate messages currently being generated or waiting for selection. These are NOT yet part of the context history.

    • toolPromptMessage

      private AbstractModelMessage toolPromptMessage
      The model message that initiated the tool calls currently awaiting user approval. This is only non-null when the status is AgiStatus.TOOL_PROMPT.

    • runningLock

      private transient ReentrantLock runningLock
      A ReentrantLock to synchronize access to shared mutable state (e.g., `running`, `stagedUserMessage`).

    • conversationSummary

      private String conversationSummary
      A high-level summary of the conversation's current state or topic.

  • Constructor Details

    • Agi

      public Agi(@NonNull @NonNull AgiConfig config)
      Constructs a new Agi session with the provided configuration.
      Parameters:
      config - The agi configuration.

  • Method Details

    • getProviders

      public List<AbstractAiProvider> getProviders()
      Gets a list of AI providers available for this session.

      Implementation details: This method performs a dynamic lookup against the container's master registry for each provider class defined in the AgiConfig.

      Returns:
      The list of shared provider instances.

    • rebind

      public void rebind()
      Re-initializes the transient PropertyChangeSupport after deserialization.

      Re-initializes the transient lifecycle flags and ensures the session is ready for active generation after deserialization.

      Specified by:
      rebind in interface Rebindable
      Overrides:
      rebind in class BasicPropertyChangeSource

    • bindToContainer

      public void bindToContainer(@NonNull @NonNull AbstractAsiContainer container)
      Re-binds this agi session to an AsiContainer after deserialization. This method re-initializes transient fields and propagates the container reference to the AgiConfig.
      Parameters:
      container - The AsiContainer to bind to.

    • autoSave

      public void autoSave(String reason)
      Performs an automatic backup of the session to the active sessions directory.
      Parameters:
      reason - the reason for the autosave

    • save

      public void save()
      Manually saves the session to the 'saved' directory.

    • setOpen

      public void setOpen(boolean open)
      Sets the visibility status of the agi in the host UI.
      Parameters:
      open - True if a tab/window is currently showing this session.

    • setSelectedModel

      public void setSelectedModel(AbstractModel selectedModel)
      Sets the selected model and fires a property change event.
      Parameters:
      selectedModel - The new model to select.

    • setRunning

      private void setRunning(boolean running)
      Sets the running state and fires a property change event.
      Parameters:
      running - The new running state.

    • setStagedUserMessage

      public void setStagedUserMessage(UserMessage stagedUserMessage)
      Sets the staged user message and fires a property change event.
      Parameters:
      stagedUserMessage - The new staged message.

    • sendMessage

      public void sendMessage(UserMessage message)
      The primary entry point for the UI to send a message. This method is designed to be called from a background thread (e.g., a SwingWorker).
      • If the agi is idle, this method will start the processing loop and block the calling thread until the entire conversation turn is complete.
      • If the agi is already busy, it will stage the message for later processing and return immediately. The ongoing loop will pick up the staged message when its current turn is complete.
      Parameters:
      message - The user's message. Can be null or empty to trigger a context resend.

    • processStagedMessage

      private void processStagedMessage()
      Processes any staged message that arrived while the agi was busy.

    • stop

      public void stop()
      Stops the current agi execution by interrupting the execution thread.

    • prepareRequest

      private GenerationRequest prepareRequest()
      Prepares the request by building the history from the context manager.
      Returns:
      A GenerationRequest containing the config and history.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if no model is selected.

    • executeTurnLoop

      private void executeTurnLoop()
      Orchestrates the conversation turn loop, handling both synchronous and streaming modes, retries, and candidate selection.

    • performSingleTurn

      private boolean performSingleTurn()
      Performs a single generation turn, including retries.
      Returns:
      true if the conversation turn is complete, false if it should continue (e.g. tool auto-run).

    • performSyncTurn

      private List<? extends AbstractModelMessage> performSyncTurn(GenerationRequest request)
      Performs a synchronous generation turn.
      Parameters:
      request - The generation request.
      Returns:
      The list of candidate messages.

    • performStreamingTurn

      private List<? extends AbstractModelMessage> performStreamingTurn(GenerationRequest request)
      Performs an asynchronous streaming generation turn.
      Parameters:
      request - The generation request.
      Returns:
      The list of candidate messages.

    • handleCandidatesStart

      private void handleCandidatesStart(List<? extends AbstractModelMessage> candidates)
      Handles the initial set of candidates received from a stream.
      Parameters:
      candidates - The list of candidate messages.

    • handleTurnResult

      private boolean handleTurnResult(List<? extends AbstractModelMessage> candidates)
      Handles the final result of a generation turn (sync or stream).
      Parameters:
      candidates - The list of candidate messages.
      Returns:
      true if the conversation turn is complete, false if it should continue.

    • chooseCandidate

      public boolean chooseCandidate(@NonNull @NonNull AbstractModelMessage message)
      Adds a chosen model message to the history, handles tool execution, and continues the conversation if necessary.
      Parameters:
      message - The model message to add.
      Returns:
      true if the conversation turn is complete, false if it should continue.

    • setActiveCandidates

      private void setActiveCandidates(List<AbstractModelMessage> candidates)
      Sets the active candidates and fires a property change event.
      Parameters:
      candidates - The new list of active candidates.

    • setToolPromptMessage

      private void setToolPromptMessage(AbstractModelMessage toolPromptMessage)
      Sets the tool prompt message and fires a property change event. If set to null while in TOOL_PROMPT status, it reverts the status to IDLE.
      Parameters:
      toolPromptMessage - The new tool prompt message.

    • clearToolPrompt

      public void clearToolPrompt()
      Clears the current tool prompt and reverts the status to IDLE if necessary.

    • checkToolPromptCompletion

      public void checkToolPromptCompletion()
      Checks if the current tool prompt is complete (no pending tools) and clears it if so.

    • processPendingTools

      public void processPendingTools()
      Processes all tool responses associated with the current tool prompt message. This method is called when the user clicks 'Run'.

    • getActiveCandidates

      public List<AbstractModelMessage> getActiveCandidates()
      Gets an unmodifiable view of the active candidates.
      Returns:
      The list of active candidates.

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Resets the entire agi session history to a clean slate.

    • getAllModels

      public List<AbstractModel> getAllModels()
      Gets a flattened list of all models available from all registered providers.
      Returns:
      A list of all available models.

    • isShutdown

      public boolean isShutdown()
      Checks if the agi session has been shut down.
      Returns:
      True if the agi is shut down, false otherwise.

    • getLastResponse

      public Optional<Response<? extends AbstractModelMessage>> getLastResponse()
      Gets the last response received from the AI model.
      Returns:
      An Optional containing the last response, or empty if none exists.

    • getLastTotalTokenCount

      public int getLastTotalTokenCount()
      Gets the total token count from the last response, if available.
      Returns:
      The total token count of the last response, or 0 if no response is available.

    • getContextWindowUsage

      public double getContextWindowUsage()
      Gets the current context window usage as a percentage (0.0 to 1.0).
      Returns:
      The context window usage percentage.

    • getDisplayName

      public String getDisplayName()
      Gets a human-readable display name for the session.
      Returns:
      The session display name (nickname or short ID).

    • setNickname

      public void setNickname(String nickname)
      Sets the nickname for the session and fires a property change event.
      Parameters:
      nickname - The new nickname.

    • setSummary

      public void setSummary(String summary)
      Sets the summary for the session and fires a property change event.
      Parameters:
      summary - The new summary.

    • getShortId

      public String getShortId()
      Gets a short version of the session ID.
      Returns:
      The short session ID.

    • shutdown

      public void shutdown()
      Shuts down the agi session, releasing resources and unregistering from global config.

    • getToolkit

      public <T> Optional<T> getToolkit(Class<T> toolkitClass)
      Convenience method to retrieve a toolkit instance from the tool manager.
      Type Parameters:
      T - The type of the toolkit.
      Parameters:
      toolkitClass - The class of the toolkit to find.
      Returns:
      An Optional containing the toolkit instance.

    • postActivate

      public void postActivate()
      Performs post-restoration logic, warming up managers and toolkits. This is called by the container after the session is bound and restored.

    • getParent

      public Optional<Agi> getParent()
      Retrieves the parent session that spawned this Agi, if any.
      Returns:
      An Optional containing the parent session.

    • getChildren

      public List<Agi> getChildren()
      Retrieves all active sessions spawned by this Agi.
      Returns:
      A list of child sessions.
